headline: Trump 🍊👑: Saudis Must KISS 🇮🇱 ISRAEL for NUCLEAR 🍄🍆 DEAL or NO ENRICHMENT 💥🚫
text: Donald Trump 🍊👨‍💼 just dropped the MIC 🎤 on Crown Prince MBS 💍👑: NO Abraham Accords 🤝🇮🇱 = NO NUCLEAR ENERGY 🍄⚛️ for the Saudis! The BIGLY Civil Nuclear Deal 📜💼 is TOTALLY subject to Riyadh recognizing the STATE OF ISRAEL 🇮🇱 or the WHOLE THING IS OFF 🚫💥! Trump posted on Truth Social 📱🔥 that the deal only covers PEACEFUL non-military use 🕊️⚛️ but Saudi Arabia MUST join the RESPECTED Abraham Accords 🤝 or it's GAME OVER 🎮💀! White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt 👩‍💼💅 confirmed Trump's been TELLING Saudi leaders this CONDITION for AGES 🕰️: "If they DON'T join the Accords, the deal is OFF 🚫!" Experts are SWEATING 😰💦 about NUCLEAR PROLIFERATION 📈☢️ in the already UNSTABLE region 🌍 but Trump's GOP controls Congress 🏛️🍆 so OPPONENTS don't have the VOTES to BLOCK it 🛑! The US Department of Energy ⚡📊 calls it a "peaceful nuclear co-operation agreement" 🤝⚛️ that will give American companies 💼🇺🇸 GREAT ACCESS to Saudi nuclear energy programs 🏭💰! IAEA 👁️🌍 is READY to implement verification measures 🔍✅ but former Israeli defense minister Avigdor Lieberman 🛡️🇮🇱 warned "Every MILITARY nuclear program BEGINS with a CIVILIAN one" 🤔☢️! Israel is WELCOMING 🤝 the news as an "HISTORIC LEAP FORWARD for peace" 🕊️🚀 while Crown Prince MBS 💍👑 said back in 2018 if Iran gets the BOMB 💣 then Saudi Arabia will FOLLOW SUIT 🏃‍♂️💨 ASAP! Rosemary Kelanic from Defense Priorities 🧠📊 says allowing Saudi uranium enrichment facilities would be "QUITE SHOCKING" 😱 because "if you can produce your own nuclear fuel, you become a MUCH BIGGER RISK" 💥☢️ for building weapons! Netanyahu's office 📱🇮🇱 called it "historic" while Israeli Economy Minister Nir Barkat 🧮🇮🇱 said his country can "MANAGE IT" if Saudis use nuclear power for PEACEFUL means 🕊️⚛️! The nuclear issue has been at the CENTER 🎯 of the months-long US-Israeli conflict with Iran 🇮🇷💥 which has been DENYING Western accusations of wanting nukes 🛡️☢️! Trump's deal JETTISONS longstanding US demands 🚀📜 and puts Saudi Arabia in the DRIVER'S SEAT 🏎️💨 but only if they RECOGNIZE ISRAEL 🇮🇱 first or the WHOLE THING GOES UP IN SMOKE 💨🔥!
